columns.description: The text of the customer query.
sample_values: Regarding the TOPSKY Galaxy Tab 3 Lite Case Kids,Galaxy Tab E Lite Case,[Robot Series] Shock-Absorption High Impact Hybrid Armor Defender Case for Samsung Galaxy Tab 3 Lite 7.0/Tab E Lite, Navy Blue/Lemony Yellow I got just now, it is defective and I need to better choice compared to it. Can you also help me change phone number for a different issue. Waiting for your prompt response.

Hello, hope you are doing well.
Regarding the Spigen Tempered Glass Screen Protector Designed for Galaxy Tab A 10.5 inch (2018) [9H Hardness/Case-Friendly] I got today, it is poor quality and I need to return this it.
Also, card declined for a different issue.
Appreciate your time!

Can you help with my LNDMA LED Cloth Dryer, Portable Dryer for Underwear and Socks, LED Light Cloth Underwear Dryer Box for Home Household? It's broken and I am looking to vs.
Please resolve this immediately.
